scripts.build:remotes: npm run build --workspace=mf-detail && npm run build --workspace=mf-history
scripts.build: npm run build:remotes && npm run build --workspace=shell
scripts.dev: npm run build:remotes && concurrently -n MF-DETAIL,MF-HISTORY,SHELL -c red,green,blue "npm run preview --workspace=mf-detail" "npm run preview --workspace=mf-history" "npm run dev --workspace=shell"
scripts.preview: npm run build && concurrently -n MF-DETAIL,MF-HISTORY,SHELL -c red,green,blue "npm run preview --workspace=mf-detail" "npm run preview --workspace=mf-history" "npm run preview --workspace=shell"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=shell && npm run test --workspace=mf-detail && npm run test --workspace=mf-history
